# Hypho Blog

Personal thoughts on AI, SEO, GEO, and the future of information discovery.

## About
Hypho is a minimalist blog focused on high-quality technical insights and philosophical reflections in the age of generative engines.

## Key Content
- [SEO vs GEO: Why AI Search is Changing My Blog Strategy](https://your-username.github.io/posts/my-first-ai-blog/) - Exploring the transition from Traditional Search Engine Optimization (SEO) to Generative Engine Optimization (GEO).
